name: NETLIST INC
summary: Netlist Inc. (NLST) is a semiconductor company that designs and sells high-performance memory solutions and resells component memory products. The company also actively monetizes, licenses, and defends a patent portfolio related to memory technology. Key activities include litigation against Samsung Electronics and Micron Technology for alleged patent infringement, and maintaining strategic partnerships with SK hynix for memory products.
